settings.title: Settings
settings.resetDescription: All settings will be restored to their default values. This cannot be undone.
settings.resetSettingDescription: This setting will be restored to its default value.
settings.tabGeneralTooltip: Recording mode, language, sound, and startup behavior.
settings.tabModelTooltip: Choose the speech-to-text model and configure the LLM post-processor.
settings.tabAudioTooltip: Microphone, voice activity detection, and silence handling.
settings.tabProcessingTooltip: Live preview, smart endpointing, and text formatting.
settings.tabDictionaryTooltip: Automatically replace words or phrases in transcribed text.
settings.tabSnippetsTooltip: Expand short triggers into longer pre-defined text.
settings.tabDesktopTooltip: Native desktop integrations: menu, clipboard, updater, and telemetry.
settings.tabHistoryTooltip: Browse past transcriptions, words-per-minute stats, and a daily-usage heatmap.
settings.tabIntegrationsTooltip: Постачальники мовних моделей (Ollama, OpenRouter) та хмарне перетворення мовлення на текст (OpenAI, ElevenLabs).

about.hugeiconsAttribution: Icons by Hugeicons — https://hugeicons.com. Used under the Hugeicons Free License.
about.licenseDescription: End User License Agreement for WinSTT.
about.noticesDescription: Open-source components, ML models, and other third-party material bundled or downloaded by WinSTT.
about.updatesDescription: WinSTT checks for updates automatically every few hours and on launch.
about.receivePrereleaseUpdatesCaption: Opt in to alpha and beta releases. Pre-release builds always update to newer pre-releases regardless of this toggle.

history.heatmapRangeHint: Pick a date range to filter the stats and table.
history.tableEmpty: No transcriptions recorded yet. Dictate something to populate the history.
history.clearDescription: All recorded transcriptions, words, and activity data will be removed. This cannot be undone.
history.historyMaxEntriesTooltip: WinSTT trims the history list whenever it exceeds this number, oldest first. Larger caps slow the settings panel and increase disk use; lower caps free space sooner. Changes apply immediately — the next save trims down to the new limit.
history.retentionCaption: Auto-delete saved WAVs by this policy
history.retentionTooltip: Controls when saved recordings (one .wav per transcription) get cleaned up. 'Keep forever' preserves everything; 'When over limit' trims when the history-entries cap is hit; the time-based options delete recordings older than the chosen age regardless of the cap. Cleanup runs at app launch and whenever this setting changes.

general.recordingModeTooltip: Push to Talk: hold the hotkey to record, release to stop. Toggle: press to start listening (auto-stops on silence), press again to stop. Listen: transcribes audio from a loopback device. Wake Word: starts a session when the selected wake word is spoken.
general.manualToggleStopCaption: Disable silence-based auto-stop in Toggle mode
general.manualToggleStopTooltip: When enabled, the recording runs continuously from the first hotkey press to the second — silence detection and sentence-pause heuristics are both turned off. Useful for long-form dictation where natural pauses are common. The whole session becomes one transcription.
general.wakeWordTooltip: Pick a wake word from the unified list. Words badged "2x" (currently only "alexa") run through BOTH detection engines and require both to agree — best accuracy. "PVP" keywords run on Porcupine (1.9, 14 built-ins, no signup). "OWW" keywords run on openWakeWord (6 community models, downloads ~10 MB on first use).
general.wakeWordSensitivityCaption: How readily the engine accepts a match
general.wakeWordSensitivityTooltip: 0 = strictest (fewer false positives, may miss soft pronunciations). 1 = most permissive (catches mumbled triggers but more random noises fire). Default 0.6 works for most voices. Try 0.5 if you get false triggers, 0.7 if the engine misses you.
general.wakeWordTimeoutCaption: Seconds the recorder stays armed after the wake word
general.wakeWordTimeoutTooltip: After the wake word fires, the recorder waits this long for you to start speaking. If you don't, the gate clears and you must say the wake word again. Prevents stray noise minutes later from triggering an accidental recording.
general.speakerDiarizationCaption: Color text per speaker in long-form recordings
general.speakerDiarizationTooltip: When on, each finalised utterance is run through an on-device speaker model (pyannote-segmentation-3.0 + wespeaker-resnet34-LM, ~32 MB downloaded on first use, no torch). Words are colored per speaker in the live overlay; speaker IDs stay stable across the whole session.
general.loopbackDeviceTooltip: Select the audio output device to capture. The app will transcribe all audio playing through this device.
general.muteSystemAudio: Reduce system audio level while dictating
general.muteSystemAudioCaption: Reduce or mute speakers while dictating
general.muteSystemAudioTooltip: Lowers (or fully mutes) your system speakers while you're dictating, then restores the volume when you stop. Prevents feedback loops and keeps transcription clean if you use speakers instead of headphones.
general.recordingSoundCaption: Play a sound when the hotkey is pressed
general.soundFileTooLong: Sound must be under {max}s (this file is {duration}s)
general.soundLibraryCaption: Pick which sound plays when recording starts. Drop .wav/.mp3 (max 3s) to add more.
general.soundLibraryTooltip: The active sound plays when a recording begins. Add custom clips by dragging audio files in or clicking Add sound — they're copied into the app's data folder and stay available across launches.
general.soundLibraryEmptyDescription: Drop a .wav or .mp3 here, or click Add sound to browse.
general.soundLibraryConfirmDelete: Remove “{name}” from your library? This deletes the file from disk.
general.showRecordingOverlayTooltip: Display a floating window with audio visualizer at the bottom of the screen during recording (PTT and toggle modes only)
general.overlayModeCaption: Where to dock the recording capsule
general.overlayModeTooltip: Choose between the floating bottom pill (default) or a Dynamic Island docked flush against the top of the primary display.
general.visualizerSizeCaption: Size preset for the floating recording pill
general.visualizerSizeTooltip: Pick one of five size presets (XS–XL) for the floating overlay pill shown during recording.
general.liveTranscriptionDisplayCaption: Where to show the live preview while dictating
general.liveTranscriptionDisplayTooltip: Choose where the live transcription preview appears: in the main app window only, under the floating recording overlay only, in both, or nowhere. The overlay options require the recording overlay to be enabled, and the realtime model to be enabled.
general.visualizerTypeTooltip: Choose the visual style for the audio visualizer. Bar: vertical bars. Grid: dot-matrix grid. Radial: circular expanding bars. Wave: oscilloscope waveform (WebGL). Aura: organic glowing aura (WebGL).
general.visualizerBarCountCaption: Number of bars in the bar visualizer (3–21)
general.visualizerBarCountTooltip: Adjust how many bars the bar-style visualizer renders. Higher counts give a denser look; lower counts feel chunkier.
general.visualizerRadialDotCountTooltip: Кількість точок, розташованих навколо радіального кільця. Що більше точок, то тонше й щільніше кільце.
general.visualizerRadialRadiusTooltip: Розмір радіального кільця у відсотках від висоти візуалізатора. Менші значення роблять кільце щільнішим, більші — розносять точки ширше.
general.visualizerGridRowsTooltip: Кількість рядів точок у сітковому візуалізаторі.
general.visualizerGridColumnsTooltip: Кількість стовпців точок у сітковому візуалізаторі.
general.visualizerGridSpeedTooltip: Наскільки швидко холоста хвиля проходить по сітці. Більше — швидше.
general.visualizerWaveSmoothingTooltip: М'якість країв хвилі. Більші значення розмивають лінію, створюючи м'якіше світіння.
general.visualizerWaveColorShiftTooltip: Веселковий зсув відтінку, застосований до країв хвилі. За 0% зберігається один суцільний колір.
general.visualizerAuraShapeTooltip: Базова форма, навколо якої утворюється аура — коло або горизонтальна лінія.
general.visualizerAuraBlurTooltip: М'якість світного поля аури. Більші значення дають плавніший і розсіяніший вигляд.
general.visualizerAuraBloomTooltip: Додаткове адитивне сяйво навколо аури. Більші значення роблять її яскравішою та насиченішою.
general.visualizerAuraColorShiftTooltip: Веселковий зсув відтінку, розподілений по всій аурі. За 0% зберігається один суцільний колір.
general.fileTranscriptionSaveLocationTooltip: Auto saves the transcription next to the source file. Ask prompts you to choose a save location each time.
general.startOnLoginCaption: Launch WinSTT when your device starts
general.languageTooltip: Language used for the interface (menus, settings, tooltips). Independent from the transcription language.
general.visualizerColorTooltip: Accent color used by the audio visualizer animation.
general.soundFileTooltip: Custom .wav or .mp3 file played when recording starts. Drop a file or browse to select one.
general.fileTranscriptionFormatTooltip: Output file format for transcribed audio/video files. TXT is plain text; SRT includes timestamps for subtitles.
general.startOnLoginTooltip: Automatically launch WinSTT each time you sign in to Windows.
general.startMinimizedTooltip: When launched, start hidden in the system tray instead of opening the main window.
general.minimizeToTrayTooltip: Closing the main window keeps WinSTT running in the system tray instead of quitting.
general.contextAwarenessCaption: Read focused window text to improve spelling of names
general.contextAwarenessTooltip: When enabled, WinSTT reads text from the focused window via Windows accessibility APIs immediately before each dictation. The text is sent to your LLM cleanup provider so names and jargon get spelled correctly. Off by default — requires opt-in.
general.contextAwarenessRequiresDictation: Requires the Dictation post-processing LLM to be enabled with a configured model — the captured window text is only used in that cleanup pass.
general.contextAwarenessDialogBody:
When enabled, WinSTT will use Windows accessibility APIs to read text from whichever app you are dictating into — including emails, chats, code editors, and browsers. The captured text is included in the prompt sent to your LLM cleanup provider (local Ollama or remote OpenRouter, depending on your settings) so that it can spell names and technical terms correctly.

This feature works across all apps with no per-app allowlist. Only enable it if you trust your configured LLM provider with the contents of the windows you dictate into.
general.contextDenyListCaption: Apps and websites that should NEVER be read for context
general.contextDenyListTooltip: When the foreground app or URL matches an entry, the focused-window text is stripped from the LLM payload — only the window title is preserved as harmless metadata. Add executable names (e.g. "1password.exe") or URL hosts (e.g. "bankofamerica.com" — subdomains match automatically). Password fields are always excluded regardless of this list.
general.contextDenyListEmpty: No entries — every app's content will be visible to the LLM when context awareness is on.
general.sendCrashReportsCaption: Help us fix bugs you can't reproduce
general.sendCrashReportsTooltip: Crash and error reports help us fix bugs you can't reproduce. No transcripts, audio, or file paths are ever sent. Restart required to take effect.
general.outputDeviceCaption: Speaker / headphones for chimes and TTS playback
general.outputDeviceTooltip: Selects the audio output device used for recording chimes and Text-to-Speech playback. System Default follows whatever Windows / your OS routes to. Only available when at least one playback source is enabled (recording sound or TTS).
general.autoSubmitCaption: Send an Enter key after each dictation pastes
general.autoSubmitTooltip: When on, WinSTT injects a key combo after each successful paste — ships chat messages without a separate Enter press. Off by default to preserve the historical 'paste and let the user review' behavior.
general.autoSubmitKeyTooltip: Enter works for most chat boxes and forms. Ctrl+Enter is the IDE / chat-app convention (Cursor, ChatGPT desktop, etc.) where plain Enter inserts a newline.

model.initialPromptTooltip: A short hint passed to the Whisper decoder before each transcription to bias spelling, capitalization, and phrasing toward what you expect — names, jargon, acronyms, or a sample sentence in your usual style. Whisper treats it as the text immediately preceding your speech. Your dictionary terms are folded in automatically, so use this for freeform style and context priming rather than exact find-and-replace. Only Whisper-family models read it; other engines ignore it.
model.initialPromptPlaceholder: e.g. A meeting about ONNX Runtime, Kokoro TTS, and DirectML.
model.deviceSectionCaption: Compute device for local speech-to-text and text-to-speech models

resourceWarning.warningTitleDictation: Model may not fit your hardware
resourceWarning.warningTitleOllama: LLM may not fit alongside your dictation model
resourceWarning.warningIntroCritical: {model} won't fit given what's currently loaded — proceeding will likely cause out-of-memory errors or fall back to CPU with major slowdowns.
resourceWarning.warningIntroWarning: {model} will fit, but only just. Tight headroom may cause stutters during transcription.
resourceWarning.reasonTightVram: Only {available} of VRAM left — uses most of your remaining headroom.
resourceWarning.reasonTightRam: Only {available} of RAM left — uses most of your remaining headroom.
resourceWarning.reasonNoGpu: No NVIDIA GPU detected — the model will run on CPU.
resourceWarning.reasonRequiresCpuQuant: This precision can't be accelerated on your GPU — it will run on CPU.
resourceWarning.reasonSttUsesGpu: Your current dictation model is already using GPU memory.
resourceWarning.reasonSttUsesRam: Your current dictation model is already in RAM.
resourceWarning.reasonUnknownFootprint: Memory footprint couldn't be estimated for this model.

model.translateToEnglishTooltip: When on, multilingual Whisper exports translate non-English audio to English in a single decoder pass — no LLM round-trip and no extra latency. English-only Whispers (the *.en variants) and non-Whisper backends (NeMo, GigaAM, Moonshine) silently fall through to normal transcription. For language-pair translation that isn't 'anything → English', use the LLM Translate modifier on the LLM tab instead.
model.modelUnloadTimeoutCaption: Free RAM/VRAM after this idle window
model.modelUnloadTimeoutTooltip: Idle-tear-down policy for the loaded ONNX session(s). After this much inactivity (no transcription requests), the server unloads the model and the OS reclaims its memory. The next PTT press transparently reloads — first press pays the cold-load cost, subsequent presses are free again. Set 'Never' to keep the model resident at all times for the lowest possible latency. Default is 5 minutes.
model.modelTooltip: The AI model used for final transcription. Larger models are more accurate but use more memory and are slower. Smaller models are faster but less accurate.
model.quantizationTooltip: Picks which ONNX weight file is loaded (e.g. encoder_model_int8.onnx). 'Auto' uses the default fp32 file — slowest but most accurate and always available. 'int8' / 'uint8' / 'q4' run faster and use less RAM with mild quality loss. 'fp16' is fastest on GPU. Not every model ships every variant: if the picked one isn't available, switch back to Auto.
model.earlyTranscriptionCaption: Seconds of silence to start early
model.earlyTranscriptionTooltip: Begin transcribing before you've fully stopped speaking, triggered after this many seconds of silence. Reduces the delay between speaking and seeing the final text. Set to 0 to disable.
model.realtimeModelTooltip: A separate, smaller model used for live preview while you speak. Runs in parallel with the main model to provide instant feedback without affecting final transcription quality.
model.useMainModelTooltip: Use the larger, more accurate main model for live preview instead of the smaller realtime model. Gives better live text but significantly increases CPU/GPU usage and may cause lag on slower hardware.
model.realtimeLockedToMainCaption: Using the main model for live preview
model.realtimeLockedToMainTooltip: Your main model is small enough to drive the live preview, so it's already being used for realtime transcription. A separate realtime model would just duplicate work without improving quality. Pick a larger main model to unlock a dedicated realtime model.
model.updateIntervalTooltip: Minimum time between live transcription updates. Lower values give more frequent updates but use more processing power. Increase if you experience stuttering or high CPU usage during dictation.

audio.deviceTooltip: Select which microphone or audio input device to use. 'System Default' uses whatever Windows has set as the default recording device.
audio.outputDeviceCaption: Speaker / headphones for chimes and TTS playback
audio.outputDeviceTooltip: Selects the audio output device used for recording chimes and Text-to-Speech playback. System Default follows whatever Windows / your OS routes to. Only available when at least one playback source is enabled (recording sound or TTS).
audio.sileroDeactivityTooltip: Uses the Silero neural network to detect when speech ends, instead of relying only on energy-based silence detection. More accurate at finding natural speech endings but uses slightly more processing power.
audio.sileroSensitivityTooltip: Silero VAD uses a neural network to detect speech. Lower values require louder/clearer speech to trigger recording. Higher values detect quieter speech but may trigger on background noise.
audio.webrtcSensitivityTooltip: WebRTC VAD provides a second layer of voice detection. Level 0 is most sensitive (detects quiet speech), level 3 is least sensitive (only loud, clear speech). Works together with Silero for more reliable detection.
audio.postSpeechSilenceCaption: Seconds of silence to end recording
audio.postSpeechSilenceTooltip: How long to wait after speech ends before finalizing the segment. Shorter values feel more responsive but may cut off pauses between sentences. Applies in Toggle and Listen modes — Push to Talk manages this automatically.
audio.clamshellCaption: Auto-swap to this mic when the lid is closed
audio.clamshellTooltip: On macOS and Linux, WinSTT polls the laptop lid state every 5 seconds. When the lid closes, recording switches to the mic selected here (e.g. an external USB mic on a dock); when the lid reopens, it switches back to the primary microphone. Leave on 'None (disabled)' to skip lid polling entirely. Windows is not yet supported.
audio.microphoneReleaseCaption: When to close the OS audio stream after a recording
audio.microphoneReleaseTooltip: Picks when the OS microphone stream is released — the trade-off is mic-in-use indicator visibility versus PTT response latency. 'Always' keeps the stream open the whole time WinSTT is running for microseconds-fast PTT (indicator stays lit). 'Off' (default) closes immediately on every key-up so the indicator clears decisively. The duration options stop the engine on key-up but defer the actual close so back-to-back presses inside the window skip the ~10-50 ms reopen cost. Changing this requires a server restart.

quality.enableRealtimeTooltip: Shows a live transcription preview that updates as you speak. The preview uses a smaller, faster model, and the final result uses the main model for better accuracy.
quality.uppercaseFirstTooltip: Capitalize the first letter of each transcribed sentence automatically.
quality.endWithPeriodTooltip: Append a period to transcribed sentences that don't already end with punctuation.
quality.removeFillerWordsTooltip: Strip disfluencies like "uh", "um", "hmm" from the transcript. Turn OFF to keep verbatim fillers (e.g. with CrisperWhisper).
quality.smartEndpointTooltip: Uses a DistilBERT classifier to detect when a sentence is complete. Complete sentences finalize faster while incomplete ones wait longer. Requires the realtime preview to be enabled. Mutually exclusive with LLM dictation cleanup — enabling one disables the other.
quality.detectionSpeedTooltip: Controls how quickly sentences are finalized. Higher values mean shorter pauses before finalization. Lower values are more patient and wait longer for the speaker to continue.
quality.endOfSentencePauseTooltip: Seconds of silence after a sentence-terminator (period, exclamation, question mark) before the recording ends. Lower values commit short utterances faster but can cut off pauses; higher values tolerate slower speech.
quality.midSentencePauseTooltip: Seconds of silence after a trailing ellipsis (…) before the recording ends. The ellipsis is the model's hint that the thought might not be complete — this pause gives the speaker time to continue.
quality.unknownSentencePauseCaption: Fallback wait when no terminator was found
quality.unknownSentencePauseTooltip: Seconds of silence after speech without a clear terminator before the recording ends. The fallback when neither sentence-end nor mid-sentence heuristics match.

hotkey.pushToTalkKeyCaption: Click Record, press your key combo, then click Stop
hotkey.pushToTalkKeyTooltip: The keyboard shortcut that triggers recording. Click Record, press the key combination you want, then click Stop.
hotkey.displayTooltip: Push-to-talk hotkey. Change it in Settings → Hotkey.
hotkey.displayTooltipDisconnected: Push-to-talk hotkey (inactive — server disconnected). Change it in Settings → Hotkey.
hotkey.shortcutsLegendCaption: Tap Up to cycle to the next recording mode without lifting the hotkey, or Backspace to cancel the current dictation.
hotkey.shortcutsLegendTooltip: These combos are detected globally while your hotkey is actively held. Cycling modes also drops the in-flight recording so the new mode starts clean.
hotkey.repasteKeyCaption: Click Record, press your key combo, then click Stop
hotkey.repasteKeyTooltip: The keyboard shortcut that re-pastes your most recent transcription. Click Record, press the key combination you want, then click Stop.
hotkey.conflictError: Conflicts with {other} ({combo}) — pick a different combination

dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.description: Teach Whisper your names, jargon, and domain terms. When a transcribed word is phonetically close to one of these entries it's snapped to the canonical spelling automatically.
dictionary.termPlaceholder: Add a name, brand, or term...
dictionary.replacementCaption: Optional — forces the term to be replaced
dictionary.autoAddCaption: Words the LLM noticed in your dictations. Accept to add to the dictionary, or dismiss.
dictionary.clearDescription: All dictionary entries will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
dictionary.thresholdCaption: Maximum fuzzy-match score the server-side corrector will accept. Lower = stricter (fewer false replacements).
dictionary.thresholdTooltip: The deterministic corrector runs on the server right after transcription and BEFORE the LLM cleanup. Anything it misses still gets a second pass through the LLM modifiers.

snippets.title: Snippets
snippets.description: Expand a spoken phrase into longer text. Triggers match fuzzily — "my email address" still fires even if Whisper hears "my e-mail address".
snippets.clearDescription: All snippets will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.

statusBar.connectingTooltip: Establishing a connection to the speech-to-text server...
statusBar.errorTooltip: Failed to connect to the speech-to-text server. Check that the server process is running.
statusBar.gpuTooltip: GPU accelerated: {name}. Faster transcription. Change in Settings → Model → Device.
statusBar.cpuTooltip: Running on CPU: {name}. Transcription will be noticeably slower than on a GPU.
statusBar.modelTooltip: Active speech-to-text model: {model}. Change it in Settings → Model.
statusBar.switchingModelTooltip: Loading {model}. The app may briefly pause while the new weights are loaded.
statusBar.loopbackActiveTooltip: Listening to system audio from this loopback device. Change it in Settings → General → Loopback Device.
statusBar.loopbackIdleTooltip: Listen mode is configured but no audio is being captured yet.
statusBar.downloadingTooltip: Downloading {model}. Click to open the picker for per-quant detail.
statusBar.downloadingMultiTooltip: {count} downloads in progress (showing leader: {model}). Click to open the picker.

audioDisplay.ariaLabel: Audio display and file drop zone

llm.translateLockedBySttTooltip: Вимкнено, поки в моделі ввімкнено переклад англійською.
llm.transformHotkeyCaption: Global combo that runs the composed transform on whatever text is currently selected.
llm.transformHotkeyTooltip: uiohook-style combo, e.g. LCtrl+LShift+T. Leave empty to disable.
llm.transformHotkeyHint: uiohook-style combo, e.g. LCtrl+LShift+P. Leave empty to disable.
llm.transformPromptPlaceholder: Describe what this transform should do…
llm.transformPromptHint: Sent verbatim as the system prompt. The selected text arrives as the user message.
llm.transformPlaygroundHint: Test the prompt against sample text — no selection or clipboard side-effects.
llm.transformPlaygroundPromptPlaceholder: Edit the prompt to preview before saving…
llm.transformPlaygroundSamplePlaceholder: Paste text to run through this prompt…
llm.playgroundHint: Test the composed prompt against sample text — no selection or clipboard side-effects.
llm.playgroundSamplePlaceholder: Paste some text to run through this section's settings…
llm.playgroundConfigHint: Pick a saved configuration to test, or build your own. Changes here don't affect your saved settings.
llm.playgroundDisabled: Enable the LLM in Dictation or Text transformation to use the playground.
llm.playgroundNoModel: Choose a model to run the playground.
llm.playgroundNoModels: No Ollama models found — install one in the Dictation or Text transformation settings first.
llm.playgroundNeedsApiKey: Add an OpenRouter API key in Integrations to test OpenRouter models.
llm.modifierPresetEmpty: No presets yet — type a name to create one.
llm.title: LLM Post-Processing
llm.subDictationCaption: Clean up and reshape dictated speech with the tone and modifiers below before it is pasted.
llm.subTransformCaption: Apply the same composed tone + modifiers to whatever text is currently selected. Bind a hotkey below to trigger it without leaving your app.
llm.providerTooltip: Use a local Ollama server, or call OpenRouter through the AI SDK with structured output.
llm.providerAppleIntelligenceIntelTooltip: Apple Intelligence requires an Apple Silicon Mac (M1 or later).
llm.appleIntelligenceDescription: Runs Apple's on-device foundation model. No setup required — works offline on macOS 15+ Apple Silicon.
llm.openrouterApiKeyCaption: Stored locally; sent only to OpenRouter
llm.openrouterApiKeyTooltip: Get a key at openrouter.ai/keys. Required for the OpenRouter provider.
llm.openrouterFallbackModelCaption: Optional. Used if the primary model errors or times out.
llm.openrouterFallbackModelTooltip: Cannot match the primary model. Empty disables fallback.
llm.endpointTooltip: URL where Ollama is running (default: http://localhost:11434)
llm.modelCaption: Select Ollama model for text enhancement
llm.modelTooltip: Larger models produce better results but are slower
llm.toneCaption: Pick one tone for the LLM to adopt
llm.toneTooltip: Mutually exclusive — only one tone applies at a time.
llm.modifiersCaption: Layer additional transformations on top of the tone
llm.modifiersTooltip: Independent toggles. Summarize and Concise expose a Low / Medium / High level.
llm.modifierLevelsCaption: Adjust how strongly this modifier is applied
llm.ollamaNotDetected: Ollama not detected. Please install Ollama and ensure it's running.
llm.ollamaNotAvailableDescription: Ollama is not running or was uninstalled. Transcriptions will work normally, but LLM post-processing is disabled. Please install Ollama and ensure it's running to use this feature.
llm.ollamaRequiredDescription: LLM post-processing requires Ollama to be installed and running. Please download and install Ollama from the official website, then try again.
llm.ollamaNotRunningDescription: Ollama is installed but not currently running. Start it to enable LLM post-processing.
llm.ollamaStartFailed: Failed to start Ollama. Please launch it manually.
llm.apiKeyRequiredDescription: OpenRouter post-processing needs an API key. Paste your key below to enable it. You can get one at openrouter.ai/keys.
llm.manageModelsDescription: Install, search, and remove Ollama models. Recommended models are small and fast — ideal for grammar and tone transformations.
llm.modelSearchPlaceholder: Search or paste a model name (e.g. llama3.2:1b)…
llm.noInstalledModels: No models installed yet. Pick one from Recommended or paste a model name above.
llm.noRecommendedMatches: No recommended models match your search.
llm.noInstalledMatches: No installed models match your search.
llm.deleteConfirmDescription: This will delete "{model}" from disk. The download cannot be resumed; you'd have to pull the model again to use it.
llm.pullCustomModelDescription: Pull any model name from the Ollama library — e.g. {example}.
llm.warmupOllamaUnreachableInstalled: Ollama is installed but couldn't be reached. We're retrying automatically — if this persists, start Ollama manually.
llm.warmupOllamaUnreachableMissing: Ollama isn't installed on this machine. Install it to use the {feature} model.
llm.warmupModelMissingDescription: Dictation will paste raw text until the model is pulled. Open the model manager to install it.
llm.warmupModelLoadFailedDescription: The file may be corrupted, the quantization may be unsupported, or Ollama may be out of memory. Try reinstalling it or pick a smaller model.
llm.discardPausedTooltip: Forget this paused download. The partial files stay on disk until the next pull consumes them or Ollama cleans them up.
llm.wontFitTooltipVram: Too large for your GPU's VRAM ({available} available, ~{required} required)
llm.wontFitTooltipRam: Too large for your system RAM ({available} available, ~{required} required)
llm.unfitInstallDescription: "{model}" is bigger than your hardware can comfortably run (~{required} needed, {available} available). It may swap to disk, run very slowly, or fail to load. Install anyway?
llm.unfitSelectDescription: "{model}" is bigger than your hardware can comfortably run (~{required} needed, {available} available). It may run very slowly or fail to load. Use it anyway?

tts.title: Text-to-Speech
tts.description: Read selected text aloud with Kokoro's local ONNX voice model. The model (~190 MB) downloads on first use and stays on disk.
tts.enabledTooltip: When on, the configured hotkey speaks the active text selection. The 'Test voice' button speaks a fixed sample.
tts.voiceCaption: 54 voices across 9 languages. Picking a voice also sets the language.
tts.hotkeyHint: Press this combo from any app to read the highlighted text aloud. Leave empty to use the in-app Speak button only.
tts.deviceCaption: Auto picks GPU when CUDA is available; falls back to CPU.
tts.testVoiceSample: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
tts.noVoicesYet: No voices loaded yet. Enable TTS to fetch the catalog.
tts.installOffline: Couldn't reach the server to size the download. Check your connection and try again.
tts.installIntro: Enabling TTS downloads these components once. They stay on disk for offline use afterward.
tts.installFootnote: This is a one-time download. Subsequent launches use the cached files.
tts.cloudVoiceCaption: Pick a voice from your ElevenLabs account (includes any custom/cloned voices). Selecting a voice previews it.
tts.cloudModelCaption: ElevenLabs synthesis model. Multilingual v2 is highest quality; Flash/Turbo trade quality for latency.
tts.stabilityCaption: Lower is more expressive and variable; higher is more consistent and monotone.
tts.similarityCaption: How closely the output adheres to the original voice.
tts.styleCaption: Style exaggeration. 0 is neutral; higher amplifies the speaker's style (adds latency).
tts.speakerBoostCaption: Boost similarity to the original speaker (slightly higher latency).
tts.cloudNeedsVerifiedKey: Add and verify an ElevenLabs API key in Integrations to use cloud voices.
tts.cloudNoVoices: No voices found for this ElevenLabs account.

errors.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

tray.selectFileTitle: Select Audio or Video File to Transcribe

desktop.title: Desktop Tools
desktop.active: Electrobun-inspired desktop controls are active for this settings window.
desktop.unavailable: Electron API is unavailable in this runtime.
desktop.menuJsonCaption: Edit JSON and apply it to the native application menu.
desktop.contextMenuHint: Right-click in this box to open a native context menu.
desktop.clipboardCaption: Read from and write to the native clipboard.
desktop.telemetryCaption: Track move/resize/focus events from this window.
desktop.telemetryClearCaption: Drop all captured events from the panel.

integrations.title: External Integrations
integrations.description: Connections shared by every LLM feature in the app — set them once here, and dictation cleanup, text transforms, and any future LLM features will use them.
integrations.keySavedLabel: A key is already saved; click reveal to view it.
integrations.openaiApiKeyCaption: Stored locally; sent only to OpenAI for cloud transcription.
integrations.elevenlabsApiKeyCaption: Stored locally; sent only to ElevenLabs for cloud transcription.
integrations.removeKeyConfirmCloud: This will disable cloud STT. Switch back to a local model?
integrations.removeKeyConfirm: Remove the saved API key for {provider}?
integrations.configureKeyTooltip: Configure an API key in Settings → Integrations
integrations.cloudHelper: Cloud STT uses one model — live preview is not available.
integrations.sourceCaption: Run transcription locally or via a cloud provider
integrations.sourceTooltip: Local runs the chosen Whisper / ONNX model on this machine. Cloud routes audio to a configured provider (OpenAI / ElevenLabs) — requires an API key set in Integrations.
integrations.llmSectionCaption: Забезпечують очищення диктування, контекстне редагування та переклад. Використовуйте локальний сервер Ollama або ключ OpenRouter.
integrations.sttSectionCaption: Транскрибуйте за допомогою хмарного постачальника замість локальної моделі. Додайте ключ тут, щоб розблокувати хмарне джерело на вкладці «Модель».
integrations.cloudDisabledHint: Додайте ключ API OpenAI або ElevenLabs на вкладці «Інтеграції», щоб увімкнути хмару.
integrations.revertedToLocal: Ключ {provider} видалено — відповідні функції повернено до локального рушія.
integrations.toastAuthFailed: {provider} authentication failed — check your key in Integrations
integrations.toastNetworkError: No internet — cloud STT unavailable. Reconnect or switch to a local model.
integrations.toastKeyMissing: No API key for {provider} — configure one in Integrations or switch model
